question: Does the output contain exactly four distinct images corresponding to the requested deliverables: (1) entrance guidance rendering, (2) greenhouse venue rendering, (3) timeline infographic, and (4) invitation card?
Does the generated invitation card image text or visuals clearly present a 'girlfriends afternoon tea' theme to serve as the requested disguise?
Does the entrance guidance rendering clearly depict a botanical garden pathway with specific decorative elements (e.g., signage, floral markers)?
Does the main venue rendering clearly depict an indoor greenhouse conservatory setting with a glass dome/roof and tropical plants?
Is the timeline presented as a structured visual infographic (e.g., flowchart, timeline bar) rather than a decorative illustration or plain text screenshot?
Does the invitation card image exhibit a hand-drawn or illustrated artistic style (e.g., watercolor, sketch) as requested?
Is the text contained within the timeline infographic and invitation card image visually legible?
Is the text organized with clear section headers or divisions corresponding to the four main deliverables?
Do the visual details in the entrance and venue renderings accurately reflect the specific decorative descriptions provided in the text?
Does the timeline infographic visually represent the same chronological stages and activities described in the text?
Do the design renderings provide concrete spatial or layout information that aids in understanding the physical setup?
Is each image placed immediately adjacent to or within the text section that describes it?
Does the text naturally introduce or reference each image (e.g., 'As shown in the rendering below...')?
